title: Rename project from Pecan to Beskid
body:
## What was done

Renamed the project from **Pecan** to **Beskid** across documentation, crate names where applicable, and workspace configuration—preserving git history under the old `pekan` remote until the repo was later deleted.

## Why it mattered

Brand and naming alignment before the compiler submodule split and public superrepo messaging; closes the “Pecan prototype” narrative while v0.0 catalog still labels the band historically.

## Outcome

Subsequent delivery bands use **Beskid** naming; seed tasks retain `source.repo: "pekan"` for provenance.

source.subject: Rename project from Pecan to Beskid across all documentation and workspace configuration
